name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help improve Asteroid
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔍 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen instead.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## 🖥️ Environment
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15]
- **Python Version**: [e.g., 3.12.3]
- **Asteroid Version**: [e.g., v0.2.0]

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (logs, error messages, etc.)
